emails.body:
Dear Valued Guest,

Earn double points on your next stay at any Hilton property worldwide. Book by October 31st and receive 2,000 bonus points after your first eligible night.

Use promo code: HILTON2X

Terms apply. Visit hiltonhonors.example/offers for details.

---
Hilton Honors Marketing Team
unsubscribe@offers.example

Last chance to claim your double points offer!

Your promo code HILTON2X expires in 48 hours. Book now at over 7,000 properties globally.

Not interested? Update preferences at hiltonhonors.example/preferences

Hilton Honors
